truth.provocation:
Are you sick?
And tired?
And disgusted?
And disappointed?

Have you had enough yet?
Are you sufficiently unsatisfied, men?

code.heading: Who We Are
code.intro:
We are THE ORDER. We are the antithesis of hedonism. In a world of fading values, we remain steadfast as righteous men of heart, soul, mind and strength. We are an Order of men who uphold the old ways of chivalry and nobility - ways that have been lost, buried, and actively destroyed. We are gentlemen; we are fathers, husbands, brothers, lovers, men of God. But we are also savages, without the pomp - ruthlessly capable of defending one another, and those it is our duty to protect.

We are men of Truth, Action and Virtue; an ageless Brotherhood.

become.closing: I hope that you join us.

founder.heading: Who Am I
paragraphs: I am a former SAS tier-1 (Special Operations) Operator with three kill/capture combat deployments - thirteen years in the military. I am a Master Freemason and a Knight of the Order of Saint Martino, Rome; a founder, an artist, a lover, a gentleman, a Christian, and a savage.

I watched, patiently, waiting for an organisation, a leader, someone or something to come forth and restore Order - to bring us back to the old ways, to be masculine and righteous again. And it did not come.
"Be the change you wish to see in the world." - Mahatma Gandhi
So I became what I wished to see in this world; and I ask you to come with us.

faq.heading: Questions a Serious Man Asks
faq.questions:
Do you wish not only to heal, but to grow and prosper?
Are you tired of swimming upstream from your destiny and from God?
Are you capable, humble and courageous enough to pass an eight-week virtual selection?
Do you want to stand in a global brotherhood of savage gentlemen who hold the same principles as you?
Do you want to attend daring, fun, life-changing retreats with those same brethren?
Do you want to work daily - held accountable, and holding others accountable - toward lasting transformation and reinvention?
Do you want to be the truest, most authentic version of yourself, released from the shackles of fear and attachment?

howWeOperate.heading: How We Operate & What to Expect
paragraphs: We meet entirely virtually, online - except for in-person retreats.
Our initial eight-week Selection & Prosperity Program is where you join: part selection, part learning to become your own coach, responsible for your own self-determined prosperity.
At the end of Selection, if it is a "fuck yes" from you and a "fuck yes" from us, you will be invited into the brotherhood.

You are now an alumnus of THE ORDER - but this is where the real work begins. We meet once a week, ongoing, to forge real, true and lasting transformation, directed by you, in your own order of necessity.
You are not alone. The other half of THE ORDER is the power of your brotherhood - the men beside you, holding one another accountable, daily, in community.

Retreats are held every three to four months, varying in activity so you can choose the ones that best serve your prosperity and needs. One retreat a year must be attended, unless you are financially limited. Retreats include survival, indigenous medicine, MMA and surf, adventure, and more.

After one to two years as an alumnus - once you have shown commitment, dedication and awareness - you will be invited to a further growth tier within the organisation. I hope to see each of you there. I will be your biggest advocate.
howWeOperate.pullQuote: If it's not a fuck yes, it's a no.

verses.text: Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind and with all your strength.
